fail_reason: Sector labels computed via raw ((b+e) mod 9) produce 0 when b+e is a multiple of 9, violating A1 (states in {1..9}, zero excluded). The correct form is the Aiq Bekar digital root 1 + ((b+e-1) mod 9). This fixture demonstrates the violation with a witness whose d_label_mod9 = 0.

witnesses.text_snippet: b=8, e=1, so d_raw = 9, and (9 mod 9) = 0, violating A1.
